questions: How do I become a copywriter?
answers: Copywriting is the art of writing persuasive text designed to sell products, services, or ideas. It appears in ads, websites, emails, and social media.
Copywriting holo ekon text lekha ja marketing ba selling er jonno use hoy. Eta ads, website, email sob jaygay lagey.
Good copywriting grabs attention with a strong headline, speaks directly to the reader's needs, and ends with a clear call to action.
To become a copywriter, practice writing headlines, study successful ads, learn about consumer psychology, and build a portfolio of sample work.
